title: KBR's Stock Falls Despite Q1 Earnings Beating Estimates
text: KBR's first-quarter earnings reflect solid Government Solutions growth and strong execution across the business.

title: Otis (OTIS) Beats on Earnings in Q1, Increases Dividend
text: Higher organic sales, margin improvement and a lower effective tax rate boost Otis Worldwide's (OTIS) Q1 earnings.

title: Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) CEO Judy Marks on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 25, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Michael Rednor - Senior Director, Investor Relations Judy Marks - Chair, Chief Executive Officer and President Rahul Ghai - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Steve Tusa - JPMorgan. Steve Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Nick Housden - RBC Capital Markets Julian Mitchell - Barclays Joe O'day - Wells Fargo Cai von Rumohr - Cowen John Walsh - Credit Suisse Joel Spungin - Berenberg Operator Good morning and welcome to the Otis First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Otis Worldwide Shares Gain Post Q1 Results
text: Otis Worldwide Corp (NYSE: OTIS) reported first-quarter FY22 sales growth of 0.2% year-over-year to $3.414 billion, +3.1% on an organic basis, missing the consensus of $3.43 billion. New Equipment sales of $1.42 billion (-2.5% Y/Y), -0.5% organic.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.67% and 0.49%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Earnings Previews: Activision Blizzard, Coca-Cola, Otis Worldwide
text: After markets closed on Wednesday, Alcoa reported earnings that beat the consensus estimate but missed the revenue estimate.
